description: Validated architecture decisions and patterns from successful pipeline runs

entries.title: NestJS domain-driven module structure
entries.content: Each business domain gets: module.ts, controller.ts, service.ts, repository.ts, dto/ directory. Max 300 lines per file. Service handles business logic, repository handles DB queries. Controller is thin — validation + delegation only.

entries.title: AWS SQS FIFO for async event processing
entries.content: Points engine events use SQS FIFO queue (POINTS_ENGINE_EVENT_QUEUE). Chosen over RabbitMQ/Redis Streams for: managed service, exactly-once processing with deduplication, DLQ built-in. Worker consumes with 20s long-poll. Idempotency key per event.

entries.title: Multi-tenancy stub from day one
entries.content: Orchestrator flagged multi-tenancy as critical risk if deferred. Pattern: organization_id + location_id on all entities from migration 001. Even if V1 is single-tenant, the schema supports multi-tenant expansion without migration. Prevents costly late refactor.

entries.title: Dual JWT rotation strategy for zero-downtime key rotation
entries.content: DevOps implements dual-secret JWT rotation: new tokens signed with new key, old tokens validated against both keys during rotation window. SSM Parameter Store for secret storage. Rotation script in scripts/rotate-jwt.sh.

entries.title: Snapshot fields survive config changes
entries.content: ERD includes snapshot fields (e.g., tier_name_snapshot on transaction records) so that historical data remains accurate even after config changes. Points awarded at time of transaction are frozen, not recomputed.

entries.title: Fire-and-forget side-effect pattern — established across modules
entries.content: Pattern: recordAgentActivity(agentId).catch(() => {}) — error swallowed, promise not awaited. Used in: logs-storage, jira-sync, pipeline-executor. Critical ops (logging, sync, timestamps) never block main request. Risk: silent failure. Mitigation: console.error in catch.

entries.title: File-based storage pattern — ensureDataDir + fs/promises + graceful fallback
entries.content: Module pattern in lib/*-storage.ts: (1) ensureDataDir(), (2) readFile+parseJSON with try/catch→default, (3) writeFile atomic, (4) MAX_ENTRIES cap. Consensus: JSON files sufficient for <1MB non-relational data. No DB needed for config/logs/analytics.

entries.title: Hydration-safe date formatting — useEffect guard for SSR
entries.content: Dates in Server Components vary by timezone. Pattern: format date only in useEffect after mount, show skeleton until ready. No suppressHydrationWarning. Prevents React hydration mismatch. Proven in footer component and activity timestamps.

entries.title: SWR with revalidateOnFocus:false for file-based APIs
entries.content: When frontend reads from file-based APIs (/api/system/config, /api/agent-activity), use SWR with revalidateOnFocus: false. File data doesn't change on window focus. Saves unnecessary reads. Established pattern across multiple components.

entries.title: Real-time monitoring � 4 subsystem health checks
entries.content: Monitoring engine checks: (1) Agent performance � success rate thresholds at 30% critical, 50% warning, token usage >80K warning. (2) KB integrity � hash validation, stale detection >7 days. (3) Pipeline health � recent run fail rate, pause rate >40%. (4) Dependencies � Agent Hub, OpenAI, KB files, analytics freshness. Auto-refreshes every 30s in UI. Health API at /api/system/health returns full report.

entries.title: 5-task system upgrade: monitoring, evolution, multi-project KB, cross-session sync, deploy-check
entries.content: Built 5 infrastructure features: (1) Real-time monitoring � 4 subsystem health checks (agents/KB/pipeline/deps) with alerts, /health page. (2) Nightly evolution � auto-extract patterns from runs, calibrate simulation, detect degradation, /api/pipeline/evolution. (3) Multi-project KB � per-project directories, cross-project search, promote-to-global. (4) Cross-session bridge � bidirectional sync between CLI memory and MC KB. (5) Deploy readiness � 6-point check for production deployment.

entries.title: Smart stage filtering � skip irrelevant agents based on task classification
entries.content: Pipeline now classifies tasks as technical/product/research/mixed and skips irrelevant stages even in full mode. Rules: technical tasks skip Research, Designer (unless UI mentioned), DevOps (unless deploy mentioned), ERD (unless DB mentioned), Cyber (unless auth/security mentioned), Business QA, Consolidation. Applied in both server-side smart-router.ts and client-side pipeline-mode-utils.ts.

entries.title: Project Discovery + Dev Server Manager � Phase 1 core
entries.content: Dynamic project discovery scans apps/ directory. Two-level detection: mission-control.json manifest (full config) or package.json fallback (auto-detect framework/stack). Dev Server Manager spawns/stops next dev on unique ports (3010+). Projects API: GET /api/projects/discover (scan), PATCH (activate/deactivate), POST /api/projects/server (start), DELETE (stop), GET (logs). Port allocation auto-increments from 3010, avoids MC port 3077.

entries.title: Project setup script � one command to prepare all projects
entries.content: scripts/setup-projects.mjs: scans apps/, tests binary health (next/vite/tsx --version), auto-fixes broken deps via npm install --nested --ignore-scripts, generates mission-control.json manifest per project with id, port, stack, devCommand, kb_scope. Handles pnpm monorepo broken symlinks by installing binaries directly. Run: node scripts/setup-projects.mjs. Results: 14/14 OK after one run.

entries.title: Skill Router � Adaptive Skill Orchestrator with ranking, roles, and execution plan
entries.content: Skill Router replaces flat skill list with intelligent orchestration: (1) Task classifier detects domains/scope/complexity, (2) Skill matcher finds candidates from 50+ manifest entries, (3) Scorer ranks by relevance + KB boost + weight - conflicts, (4) Conflict resolver drops lower-scored duplicates, (5) Role assigner: max 2 primary + support + guard, (6) Returns ordered execution plan with confidence. Max 6 skills per task. API: POST /api/skills/route. Every skill has domains, scope, complexity, defaultRole, conflictsWith, weight.

entries.title: Skill Router v1 � tuned scoring with 9 factors
entries.content: Skill Router scoring factors: (1) domain relevance 0-40, (2) scope match +20/-10, (3) complexity fit +10/-5, (4) base weight 0-10, (5) KB boost 0-15 from failure/success patterns, (6) keyword match +10, (7) specificity penalty -8 for heavy skills on simple tasks, (8) support penalty -12 for narrow tasks, (9) design tool penalty -15 for non-design tasks. Min score threshold: 20. Max 6 skills, max 2 primary. Conflict resolution drops lower-scored duplicates. Tested on 6 task types: auth, css-fix, deploy, pipeline-fix, endpoint, design.

entries.title: Figma access token — expires 2026-07-03
entries.content:
Figma personal access token for Designer agent pipeline integration.

- **Created**: 2026-04-04
- **Expires**: 2026-07-03 (90 days)

- **Stored**: data/api-keys.json → figma.accessToken
- **Used by**: /api/figma route → pipeline designer-agent tools
